channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Obama Presidential Center opens in Chicago with star-studded celebrations
item.description: The Obama Presidential Center's grand opening featured tributes from family and colleagues, along with musical performances.

item.title: GOP congressman absent for months plans return on June 30
item.description: Republican Rep. Tom Kean Jr. of New Jersey is scheduled to return to Congress on June 30 after an unexplained absence since March, his spokesperson said.

item.title: National parks remove civil rights and climate change materials
item.description: The Trump administration released the first public list of materials on civil rights and the environment removed by the National Park Service.

item.title: Supreme Court allows some marijuana users to own guns
item.description: The Supreme Court ruled for Ali Hemani, a Texas man charged with unlawful gun possession after admitting regular marijuana use.
